name: TOP_ASSIGNEES_BY_PATENT_COUNT
description: List the top assignees ranked by patent count.
cypher:
MATCH (p:Patent)-[:HAS_ASSIGNEE]->(a:Assignee)
RETURN a.name AS company, count(DISTINCT p) AS patent_count
ORDER BY patent_count DESC, company
LIMIT 10;

examples: Which companies have the most patents?
List the top 10 assignees by patent count.
